page: Vultr vcg-a16-96c-960g-256vram is a high-density GPU-accelerated server instance designed for parallel processing workloads. The system features 96 Intel x86_64 vCPUs mapped to 96 physical cores with a single thread per core configuration. This CPU setup operates on a shared allocation model. The server is equipped with 960.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 10.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator hardware consists of 16 NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 256 GB of VRAM, with each GPU containing 16 GB of dedicated memory. For local storage, the instance includes a 1700 GB NVMe SSD, which provides high-speed read and write capabilities for local datasets. Additionally, the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Given the massive GPU count and high system memory capacity, this instance is built for workloads requiring extensive parallel graphics processing, high-density virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI), video streaming, and media transcoding. The 16-GPU configuration offers a highly consolidated hardware profile, allowing organizations to run large-scale concurrent streaming or rendering tasks on a single virtual machine rather than distributing workloads across multiple smaller nodes.
description: Vultr vcg-a16-96c-960g-256vram is a high-density GPU-accelerated server instance designed for highly parallelized workloads. It is equipped with 96 Intel x86_64 vCPUs across 96 physical cores on a shared allocation model, paired with 960.0 GB of system memory. The primary acceleration is delivered by 16 NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs, providing a combined total of 256 GB of VRAM. Local storage is supported by a 1700 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. This hardware profile is optimized for high-density virtual desktop infrastructure, video transcoding, and concurrent media streaming. By consolidating 16 GPUs and substantial memory into a single instance, it offers a dense resource footprint for demanding multi-stream and rendering applications.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a16-96c-960g-256vram is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 96 Intel vCPUs, 960 GB of RAM, 16 NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs with 256 GB of total VRAM, and a 1700 GB NVMe SSD for parallel workloads.

tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring sixteen NVIDIA Ampere accelerators and massive system memory for parallel streaming and virtualization workloads.

96 Intel x86_64 vCPUs with 960 GB of system memory
